target:
The atmosphere is completely different from here.
It's not an artificial structure!! It's a natural cave…!!

Yeah… and this smell.
The scent of saltwater…! The sea must be close!

This is bad…
How… when did…?

I can feel the shadows… around us!
From the right… from the left…!!
We're surrounded!

Huh… how many are there…?
Are all these stray shadows!?

Stop that!
Shinpei, what do we do!?

(Ah, that was close!
I didn't expect them to jump out like that…!)

Shaa!
Shadows, get out of the way!!

Oh.
Oh my god!!
Ohhh… Hey!!

T-these guys, they're not coming out infinitely, are they!?
Shinpei, what should we do!?

It's impossible to completely defeat them!
We'll take down as many as we can and somehow run through!

Hey Ryunosuke!!
If you're going to attack the shadow, say so!!
My ears are going crazy!!

Sorry…
But if you say it, you'll die.

Tch.
But under the island… Shadows are swarming… What a mess…

They're increasing in number.
It's close… Their nest…

What the hell!!!
No matter how much I cut, it's endless!!!

These guys!!!
They're persistently targeting Ushio!
(They haven't attacked me at all since earlier!)

Ugh!!
The shadow is coming again…
(With a lighter and insect spray… A flamethrower!!)

Nice!!!
You had this insect spray for this?!

Yeah!!! Just as I thought!!!
There's no creature that fears fire!

You'll be okay, Ushio…
You can still go back now…

I'm fine!
After coming this far…

Go all the way!!!
I hate half-hearted efforts!!!

Shinpei!!!
I'll clear the path!!!
You rely on Ushio!!!
